description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.5 Docker image with four stages: build, test, deploy-test, and deploy. Add a lint job in the build stage that runs `python setup.py flake8`. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `python setup.py test`. Add a staging job in the deploy-test stage that runs `apt-get update -qy`, `apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ruby-dev rubygems`, `gem install dpl`, and `dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_STAGING_APP --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY`, and configure it to run only on the master branch of the PythonDevCommunity/pythondev-site project. Add a production job in the deploy stage that runs the same apt and dpl commands but with `$HEROKU_PROD_APP`, and configure it to run only on tags of the same project, deploying to Heroku.
